description: Identify and classify errors by type (missing_value, invalid_format, outlier, duplicate, type_error, inconsistency)

grading.description: Accuracy of row_id + column + error_type matching against ground truth

prompt_template: Review the dataset and classify each error. Respond with JSON: {"errors": [{"row_id": N, "column": "...", "error_type": "..."}, ...]}
